name: YouTube Shorts
description: Short-form vertical video product from YouTube, launched in 2020 as a TikTok-style mobile-first format.

years.notes: YouTube Shorts launched in beta in India on September 15, 2020 with this stylized red S mark containing a white play triangle. The visual identity has remained essentially unchanged since launch (global rollout July 2021). Source viewBox 0 0 98.94 122.88 wrapped in a 24x24 scale group centered horizontally (baked at build via SVGO convertTransform).
